text:
PRUNTY MEMORIAL HIGHWAY. (a) The portion of Farm-to-Market Road 1810 in Jack County beginning at its intersection with State Highway 59 to the eastern boundary of Jack County is designated as the Luther G. Prunty Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Luther G. Prunty Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(46), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.134 — Luther G

PRUNTY MEMORIAL HIGHWAY. (a) The portion of Farm-to-Market Road 1810 in Jack County beginning at its intersection with State Highway 59 to the eastern boundary of Jack County is designated as the Luther G. Prunty Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Luther G. Prunty Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.123 (Rosa Parks Memorial Parkway) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(46), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 54 (H.B.409), Sec. 1, eff. May 22, 2017.*
